name: Technology
description: Software, AI, infrastructure and the products built on top of them.
outlook: Very high demand; fast-changing skill requirements.

name: Tech-Enabled Business
description: Roles that sit between technology and business strategy -- product, operations, growth.
outlook: Strong demand; rewards people comfortable bridging technical and commercial teams.

name: Business & Management
description: Strategy, operations, marketing and leadership across all sectors.
outlook: Stable, broad demand; transferable across industries.

name: Finance
description: Markets, analysis, accounting, and the management of money and risk.
outlook: Stable demand; increasingly intertwined with data and technology.

name: Engineering
description: Designing, building and maintaining the physical and mechanical world.
outlook: Steady, long-term demand; chartered status adds significant earning power.

name: Medicine
description: Diagnosing, treating and caring for patients as a doctor or specialist.
outlook: Persistent shortage in most specialties; long, structured training pathway.

name: Design
description: Visual, product and experience design across digital and physical products.
outlook: Competitive but stable; portfolio matters more than formal qualifications.

name: Design & Technology
description: Design roles embedded in software and product teams.
outlook: Strong demand where design and engineering overlap.

name: Education
description: Teaching, training and supporting learning at any level.
outlook: Consistently high demand; routes in via degree, apprenticeship or career change.

name: Law
description: Legal advice, advocacy and regulation across sectors.
outlook: Competitive entry; stable demand once qualified.

name: Healthcare
description: Frontline and allied health roles beyond medicine, such as nursing.
outlook: Persistent national shortage; very stable demand.

name: Creative Technology
description: Roles combining creative production with technical/interactive skills, e.g. games.

name: Science & Research
description: Laboratory, analytical and research-led roles across scientific disciplines.

name: Media & Communication
description: Journalism, content and public-facing communication roles.
outlook: Competitive and shifting fast with digital platforms.
